goal: Reduce public Work detail video response payload by omitting nullable optional WorkVideoDto fields when null, without cache or test target shortcuts.
changed: Annotated nullable WorkVideoDto properties with JsonIgnoreCondition.WhenWritingNull.
Captured rebuilt dev compose payload and k6 smoke artifacts.
notChanged: No Real Backend Test target selection change.
No DB schema, EF query, Npgsql pool, or nginx config change.
No public body payload behavior change.

validations.name: Focused RED/GREEN integration test
validations.result: failed before implementation, passed after implementation

validations.name: Full backend solution
validations.result: passed with Contract 1 skipped, Component 124, Unit 56, Architecture 35, Integration 227

validations.name: Dev compose rebuild
validations.command: BACKEND_PUBLISH_PORT=18080 docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml up -d --build backend nginx

validations.name: k6 Work detail smoke
validations.command: backend-container k6 run /tmp/public-api-rps.js with BASE_URL=http://nginx TARGET_PATH=/api/public/works/seeded-work RATE=50 DURATION_SECONDS=10 MAX_VUS=100

risks: Clients that require explicit null keys would need adjustment, but current frontend parser treats missing optional fields as null-equivalent.
k6 smoke is not a 1000rps capacity proof.
Seeded Work was used only as deterministic video payload smoke, not as a Real Backend target-selection change.
recommendation: Promote through dev CI, then continue with larger heavy-detail payload/body or Work-video query reduction only if Real Backend target metrics still show that path as material.
